author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 7e2230fe. Tensor::contiguous_in(MemoryFormat::ChannelsLast{,3d}) on CUDA tensors now dispatches to gpu_strided_copy with a permuted (shape, src_stride) pair so the conversion stays on-device. Permutation [0,2,3,1] for NCHW→NHWC and [0,2,3,4,1] for NCDHW→NDHWC make the kernel's linear output iteration match the channels-last physical layout. CPU fallback preserved for rank > 8 / unsupported dtypes / kernel errors. 5 integration tests on real RTX 3090 covering 4D, 5D, round-trip, cheap-clone short-circuit, and unit-dim edge case.
